title: PR-2 autonomous town life architecture and reviewed task DAG
summary: Rebaseline post-PR-1 product truth, define autonomous resident behavior and presentation contracts, reconcile legacy control-plane wording, and create a finite reviewed PR-2 implementation/integration/product-acceptance DAG without product code.
acceptance: Project truth and scorecard are updated from PR-0/PR-1 to reviewed PR-2 planning without overstating playable or release readiness
Architecture defines authoritative autonomous behavior for at least eight residents across a full game day using needs, schedules, capabilities, indexed Top-K work selection, reservations and pathing
Architecture defines explicit serializable resident/job states, structured reason codes, pause and 1x/2x/4x semantics, projection/interpolation ownership and player-visible progress
Evidence plan combines deterministic simulation, real Web interaction/continuous behavior capture and independent human/reviewer observation; debug payload alone cannot pass
Inventory classifies reusable PR-1 and historical M1-M8 stores plus missing product integration, performance and save boundaries

A finite executable PR-2 DAG has exact dependencies, file ownership, allowed/forbidden paths, required gates, integration and independent product-acceptance tasks, with at most three concurrent write-heavy tasks
WM-0154 blocker wording is reconciled to current PR-1 facts while WM-0154 remains blocked and WM-0155/WM-0156 remain frozen until their roadmap gates
No product implementation, protocol/schema/save mutation, implementation claim, release action or PR-3+ implementation is executed

history.details: Recorded WM-0166 as the completed PR-1 predecessor. WM-0169 remains ready because that dependency was already independently verified, integrated and done before task creation.

saveLoadStance: PR-2 planning may preserve and classify the authoritative save boundary, but it does not implement GameSession save/load, mutate a save format or make a public compatibility promise.
forbiddenPaths: claiming or promoting PR-2 implementation tasks before WM-0169 is independently verified, integrated and done
unblocking or claiming WM-0154, WM-0155 or WM-0156
creating or claiming PR-3+ implementation tasks
protocol/schema/save mutation without a separate explicit reviewed decision and exclusive task ownership
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility actions
singleWriterRule: WM-0169 is the sole PR-2 planning writer. Every proposed implementation, integration and product-acceptance task must remain proposed and unclaimed until this planning task is independently verified, integrated and done.
